title: Strategy advisor
intro: You're booking a strategy session. A short set of context questions comes before payment.
bio: I work with founders on hard strategic decisions — pricing, positioning, and the messy choices between them. Most clients come to me before a fundraise, a pivot, or a launch.

title: Small-animal clinic
intro: You're booking a visit for your pet. We'll ask for some pre-visit information first.
bio: A friendly neighbourhood clinic for cats, dogs, and small animals. Wellness checks, vaccinations, and the occasional worried first-time owner — all welcome.

title: Therapist & counsellor
intro: You're booking an intro session. There's a short intake and acknowledgement before payment.
bio: I offer a calm, judgement-free space to talk things through. Many people come for a single conversation; others stay for a while. Either is completely fine.

title: Personal trainer
intro: You're booking a first session. Tell us your goals and any injury history before payment.
bio: I build training that fits your life, not the other way around. We start with where you are, set goals you actually care about, and move at a pace that sticks.
